tool_definitions.name: web_fetch
tool_definitions.description: Fetch a URL and return the response. HTML content is converted to text or markdown by default. Response body is truncated to ~50K chars. Private/internal URLs are blocked.

tool_definitions.name: web_search
tool_definitions.description: Search the web for information. Returns a list of results with title, URL, and snippet. Requires a search backend to be configured in the executor.

steps.message: Use the web_fetch tool to fetch "http://example.com" and tell me the page title.

tools.name: web_fetch

steps.message:

- **permissions**: bypass (allow all)
- **hooks**: Active hooks: on-tool-exec
